headline: PopSips Expands Its Spiked Prebiotic Soda Into 2,000 New Target, Walmart, Kroger, Safeway, and Sprouts Stores
summary: PopSips, the first spiked prebiotic soda and the better alternative this generation actually wants to drink, is now available in more than 2,000 stores nationwide, including Target, Walmart, Kroger, Safeway, Albertsons, HEB, and Sprouts. Heading into summer, the brand has completed its largest retail expansion ever, anchored by the Anheuser-Busch and Molson Coors independent wholesaler networks, with PopSips now active in 18 states.

content.title: PopSips Expands Its Spiked Prebiotic Soda Into 2,000 New Target, Walmart, Kroger, Safeway, and Sprouts Stores
content.summary: PopSips, the first spiked prebiotic soda and the better alternative this generation actually wants to drink, is now available in more than 2,000 stores nationwide, including Target, Walmart, Kroger, Safeway, Albertsons, HEB, and Sprouts. Heading into summer, the brand has completed its largest retail expansion ever, anchored by the Anheuser-Busch and Molson Coors independent wholesaler networks, with PopSips now active in 18 states.

headline: Kroger (NYSE:KR) Exceeds Q1 CY2026 Expectations
summary: Grocery retail giant Kroger (NYSE:KR) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 2.2% year on year to $46.12 billion. Its GAAP profit of $1.46 per share was 8.6% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: Kroger (NYSE:KR) Exceeds Q1 CY2026 Expectations
content.summary: Grocery retail giant Kroger (NYSE:KR) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 2.2% year on year to $46.12 billion. Its GAAP profit of $1.46 per share was 8.6% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Stocks Rally Before the Open on U.S.-Iran Peace Deal
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are up +0.98%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are up +1.64% this morning, pointing to a sharply higher open on Wall Street as sentiment got a boost after U.S. President Donald Trump signed a preliminary agreement to end the Iran war.
